theme.en: Computex Week Pulls Demand to Taipei; Supply Quietly Builds Elsewhere
theme.zh: Computex周需求聚向台北,产能则在他处悄然生长

dek.en: Huang and Su both land in Taipei the same Sunday; Samsung's chairman meets MediaTek's CEO; Nvidia is reportedly flying to Taiwan nearly every month. Meanwhile Micron's Virginia fab spins up first US 1α DDR4, China's chip exports double to $31B, ASML's High-NA EUV moves from lab to fab, and Hua Hong beats and raises. Demand and political weight are pulling toward Taipei; capacity and policy are building around it.
dek.zh: 周日的台北同时迎来黄仁勋和苏姿丰;三星会长李在镕与联发科CEO会面;据报道英伟达高层几乎每月飞台。与此同时,美光弗吉尼亚厂启动美国首条1α DDR4产线,中国芯片出口翻倍至310亿美元,ASML High-NA EUV从实验室走入晶圆厂,华虹财报上调指引。需求与政治分量都在朝台北汇聚,而产能与政策正在他处构筑。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Huang and Su both touch down in Taipei a week before Computex 2026
title.zh: Computex前一周,黄仁勋与苏姿丰同日落地台北

summary.en: Jensen Huang and Lisa Su arrived in Taipei on the same day ahead of Computex 2026, where Nvidia is expected to detail Rubin-generation production timing and AMD to lift the cover on the MI455X / Helios rack. The proximity of the two CEOs to the same handful of TSMC executives and downstream OSATs in a single week, every year, is the most visible measure of how concentrated the AI silicon supply chain has become — and how non-fungible the relationships are. Separately, Reuters reports Huang has been flying to Taiwan almost every month, asking for more.
summary.zh: 黄仁勋与苏姿丰同日抵达台北,准备出席一周后的Computex 2026:Nvidia预计将公布Rubin世代量产时间,AMD预计揭开MI455X / Helios机柜面纱。两位CEO每年同周与同一批台积电高层及下游封测代工沟通,这是AI硅片供应链高度集中的最直观体现——以及关系不可替代的直接证据。另据路透社报道,黄仁勋'几乎每月飞台',持续要求更多产能。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: 'Union-free' TSMC faces worker backlash over bonus-cut rumors
title.zh: '无工会'的台积电因奖金缩水传闻面临员工反弹

summary.en: Reports out of Seoul this weekend say TSMC's rank-and-file are pushing back on rumored cuts to year-end bonuses — unusual visibility for a company that has historically operated without a union. The story matters less for the dollar amounts and more as a signal: as TSMC's profit share concentrates further into AI-led capacity, the social compact inside the company is now an actual factor for outside customers planning capacity that depends on uninterrupted ramp.
summary.zh: 周末韩媒报道,台积电基层员工对年终奖金削减传闻表达不满——对一家长期以'无工会'运作的公司而言,这种公开反弹颇为罕见。本则故事的意义不在金额,而在信号:随着台积电利润进一步向AI驱动产能集中,公司内部的社会契约本身已成为外部客户进行依赖性产能规划时的真实变量。

title.en: Hua Hong jumps 12% after Q1 beat and raised guidance
title.zh: 华虹半导体Q1超预期、上调指引后股价大涨12%

summary.en: Shanghai-headquartered foundry Hua Hong (1347.HK) is up 12% after a Q1 beat and a raised full-year guide, driven by mature-node capacity (28nm and above) running flat-out for power management, display drivers, and embedded MCU customers shut out of TSMC's allocation. The takeaway: while the AI cycle is sucking advanced-node bandwidth into a few names, the mature-node squeeze that's hammering DDR4 and automotive logic is making Chinese foundries the marginal supplier and the marginal price-setter.
summary.zh: 总部位于上海的代工厂华虹(1347.HK)在Q1超预期、并上调全年指引后大涨12%;驱动来自成熟节点(28nm及以上)满产运行,服务于被挤出台积电产能的电源管理、显示驱动与嵌入式MCU客户。要点:当AI周期将先进节点带宽吸入少数厂商,挤压DDR4与车规逻辑的成熟节点紧缺,正让中国代工厂成为边际供应方,也成为边际定价方。

title.en: Samsung chairman Lee Jae-yong visits MediaTek HQ, meets CEO Rick Tsai
title.zh: 三星会长李在镕到访联发科总部,会晤蔡力行CEO

summary.en: Samsung Electronics chairman Lee Jae-yong visited MediaTek's Hsinchu headquarters this weekend, meeting CEO Rick Tsai face-to-face. The optics matter: Samsung wants MediaTek's mid-range smartphone SoC business for its 4nm foundry, MediaTek wants alternative leading-edge capacity to TSMC, and both companies are explicitly hedging the Taiwan-strait risk in different directions. A meeting between the principals — not just the engineering teams — signals that something more than parts-bidding is being discussed.
summary.zh: 三星电子会长李在镕本周末造访联发科新竹总部,与CEO蔡力行面晤。表象之外的信息:三星希望承接联发科中高端智能手机SoC的代工业务以填充其4nm产线,联发科则需要台积电之外的尖端节点备选,双方都在以不同方式对冲两岸风险。两家公司由最高负责人(而非工程团队)出面会谈,信号强度远超普通比稿。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储器

title.en: Micron begins first US production of 1α DDR4 at Manassas
title.zh: 美光在弗吉尼亚马纳萨斯启动美国首条1α DDR4产线

summary.en: Micron has begun mass production of 1α-node (10nm-class fifth-gen) DDR4 at its expanded Manassas, Virginia fab — the first time that node has been produced in the United States. Yesterday's headline was that Manassas would 'quadruple US DDR4 output'; today's is that it's not just more DDR4 but the most-advanced DDR4 anyone is willing to make at scale, since the rest of the industry has shifted leading-edge capacity to DDR5 and HBM. The strategic value here is dual: a domestic-source for automotive and defense, and continued profitability on a node everyone else abandoned.
summary.zh: 美光已在弗吉尼亚州马纳萨斯扩建厂开始1α节点(10nm级第五代)DDR4的量产——这是美国本土首次生产该节点产品。昨日的标题是'美国DDR4产能将翻两番';今日补足的是:不仅产能更高,而且是业内仍愿意大规模生产的最先进DDR4,因为其他厂商已将先进产能转向DDR5与HBM。战略价值有二:为汽车与国防提供本土来源,以及在他人放弃的节点上维持盈利能力。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: ASML's High-NA EUV machines move from lab to fab as orders swell
title.zh: 随着订单增加,ASML的High-NA EUV从实验室进入晶圆厂

summary.en: Order data and reports out today indicate ASML's High-NA EUV systems are no longer pilot-only — multiple leading-edge customers (TSMC, Intel, Samsung have been publicly named) are now placing production orders rather than evaluation tools. At roughly $380M+ per tool, High-NA is the gating capex for sub-2nm logic; the transition from 'one tool per fab for learning' to 'a line per node' is what reshapes capex schedules for the rest of the decade.
summary.zh: 今日订单数据与多方报道显示,ASML的High-NA EUV设备已不再仅为试用阶段——多家先进节点客户(已公开提及台积电、Intel、三星)正在从评估用机转向量产订单。每台造价约3.8亿美元以上,High-NA是2nm以下逻辑节点的关键资本开支门槛;从'每厂一台用于学习'到'每节点一条产线'的转变,将重塑本十年余下时间的资本开支节奏。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘

title.en: China's chip exports double to $31B in 2026 as US restrictions inadvertently fuel domestic AI demand
title.zh: 2026年中国芯片出口翻倍至310亿美元,美国管制反而催热本土AI需求

summary.en: Chinese customs data show 2026 chip exports running at roughly $31B — double the prior year — driven mostly by domestic AI-accelerator and mature-node logic shipping into Southeast Asia and the Middle East. The export-controls architecture was designed to slow China's AI capability by starving it of leading-edge inputs; in practice, restricted access to Nvidia/AMD has accelerated domestic alternatives whose finished output China can now sell to third countries. The number is policy-meaningful: the gap that controls aimed to widen is narrowing.
summary.zh: 中国海关数据显示,2026年芯片出口约310亿美元,较上年翻倍,主要来自国产AI加速器与成熟节点逻辑出口至东南亚及中东。出口管制架构原本意在通过切断尖端投入来减缓中国AI能力;实际效果是:Nvidia/AMD的受限准入加速了国产替代,而中国现已能将其成品出口至第三国。该数据具有政策意义:管制本欲拉开的差距正在缩小。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: ON Semi: record free cash flow, $6B buyback, and a new GaN line reset the story
title.zh: ON Semi:创纪录自由现金流、60亿美元回购,新建GaN产线改写叙事

summary.en: ON Semiconductor (Onsemi) closed a week of revisions with three simultaneous announcements: record quarterly free cash flow, a $6B share-buyback authorization, and a new GaN production line targeting EV traction inverters. Power-semi names have been treated as cyclical drag-anchors in 2026 by analysts who anchored on the EV cycle alone; the GaN line announcement says management thinks the next leg is silicon-carbide-and-gallium-nitride content per vehicle, not unit volume.
summary.zh: 安森美(Onsemi)以三项同步公告结束了一周的修正:创纪录的季度自由现金流、60亿美元股票回购授权,以及一条面向电动车牵引逆变器的GaN新产线。2026年至今,功率半导体股被锚定EV周期的分析师当作周期性拖累;GaN产线公告则表明管理层判断下一段成长来自每车SiC+GaN材料含量提升,而非整车销量。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: TEMC takes 31% of A-Tech Solution to broaden Korean semi-materials footprint
title.zh: TEMC收购A-Tech Solution 31%股权,拓宽韩国半导体材料布局

summary.en: Korean semi-gases supplier TEMC took a 31% stake in A-Tech Solution, an etching-related materials startup, framed as diversification away from its bread-and-butter HF / etching-gas business. The deal is small in dollar terms but is the third Korean materials-side M&A in the past two months — the layer of the industry adjacent to Samsung/SK Hynix is consolidating quietly while the headline accelerator names dominate attention.
summary.zh: 韩国半导体气体供应商TEMC收购刻蚀相关材料初创公司A-Tech Solution 31%股权,定位为从其主营的HF/刻蚀气体业务向外多元化。金额不大,但这是过去两个月韩国材料端第三笔M&A——在加速器头部公司吸走全部目光时,围绕三星/SK海力士的材料层正在悄然整合。

theme.en: Data Movement Is the New Compute
theme.zh: 数据搬移就是新的算力

dek.en: Five of this week's hardware papers attack data movement directly — pushing crypto into DRAM, multicasting collectives instead of duplicating sends, overlapping operators inside a single device, cutting video-DiT tokens, and shifting LLM inference accounting from prefill-bound to capacity-bound. The shared assumption: compute density is no longer the constraint the field thinks it is.
dek.zh: 本周硬件论文中,有五篇直接针对数据搬移做文章——把密码运算下沉到DRAM、用多播替代重复发送实现集合通信、在单设备内进行算子重叠、削减video-DiT的token数、并把LLM推理记账从'prefill约束'转向'容量约束'。共识在于:计算密度已不是业界以为的那个核心瓶颈。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: An AI-driven robotic system for automated 2D van-der-Waals hetero-assembly
title.zh: 用于自动化二维范德瓦尔斯异质组装的AI驱动机器人系统

summary.en: 2D van-der-Waals stacks (twisted bilayer graphene, hBN/MoS2, etc.) are a key materials platform for quantum simulation and exotic electronic phases, but assembly is essentially handcraft — operator-led, slow, hit-or-miss. The group automates the stacking via an AI-driven robotic system that handles flake identification, alignment, and transfer. Materials-layer infrastructure rather than a new device, but the kind of tooling that scales an entire research-method bottleneck once it works.
summary.zh: 二维范德瓦尔斯堆叠结构(扭转双层石墨烯、hBN/MoS2等)是量子模拟与新电子相态的关键材料平台,但组装本质仍是手工——人工操作、慢、命中率低。作者通过AI驱动的机器人系统自动完成薄片识别、对位与转印。这并非新器件而是材料层基础设施,一旦走通,可释放整条研究方法瓶颈的产能。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与体系结构

title.en: Aging-aware arithmetic multipliers under NBTI and process variation
title.zh: 考虑NBTI老化与工艺偏差的算术乘法器设计

summary.en: Multipliers are the workhorse of AI accelerators — systolic arrays, tensor cores, FPGAs all multiply constantly. NBTI aging shifts threshold voltages on the most-stressed transistors over years; in a multiplier that runs at near-100% utilization for the chip's life, the cumulative drift is real and pushes timing margins out of the window. The paper proposes a designable margin-and-redundancy combination targeted at AI duty cycles specifically. Worth reading because most aging-aware design work has assumed CPU-style bursty utilization, not LLM-serving sustained 90%+.
summary.zh: 乘法器是AI加速器的主力单元——脉动阵列、Tensor Core、FPGA本质都在持续做乘法。NBTI老化在受应力最强的晶体管上长期推高阈值电压;在芯片寿命内接近满负载的乘法器中,累积漂移真实且会把时序裕度推出窗口。本文提出针对AI工作负载占空比的可设计裕度与冗余组合。值得一读:既有的老化感知设计大多默认CPU式的突发占用,而非LLM服务式的持续90%+占用。

title.en: iHAC: integrated high-availability cluster architecture with hybrid resource pooling
title.zh: iHAC:具备混合资源池化的集成高可用集群架构

summary.en: Traditional HA clusters keep a hot standby idle for failover, which both wastes resources and creates single-point-of-failure exposure when the standby drifts out of sync. iHAC integrates compute pooling with availability so the 'standby' capacity does productive work and failover is a routing change, not a resource flip. Concrete architecture proposal with simulation; the interest for AI-serving systems is direct — keeping a hot GPU idle 'just in case' costs more than the workload that displaced it.
summary.zh: 传统高可用集群将热备节点闲置以备故障切换,既浪费资源,又因备机长期未同步而构成新的单点风险。iHAC将算力池化与可用性整合,使'备份'容量参与生产负载,故障切换变为路由切换而非资源重置。具体架构方案配仿真;对AI服务系统直接相关——为'以防万一'保留闲置GPU的成本,常常高于被它挤掉的负载本身。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: Near-memory cryptography: AES-128 and SHA-256 inside the DRAM, not on the CPU
title.zh: 近存储密码运算:在DRAM内而非CPU上完成AES-128与SHA-256

summary.en: AES-128 and SHA-256 are fast on a CPU per-op but their *bandwidth* profile is terrible — they sit at the wrong end of a memory bus. The group implements both primitives inside the DRAM via near-memory processing, returning ciphertext/hashes directly without round-tripping plaintext over the CPU bus. The compute saved isn't the headline; the bandwidth saved is. For full-disk encryption and storage-tier hashing — which scale linearly with data volume — this is the right place to put the primitive.
summary.zh: AES-128与SHA-256每次操作在CPU上很快,但其'带宽特征'糟糕——位于内存总线的不利端。作者通过DRAM内近存储处理实现两种原语,直接返回密文/哈希,避免明文在CPU总线上往返。节省的算力不是重点,节省的带宽才是。对于全盘加密与存储层哈希(其规模随数据量线性增长),把原语放在这里才是正确的位置。

title.en: ORBIS: output-guided token reduction for video Diffusion-Transformer acceleration
title.zh: ORBIS:面向视频DiT加速的输出引导token裁剪

summary.en: Video Diffusion Transformers blow up compute because 3D spatio-temporal attention scales with token-count × frames. Most token-reduction methods key on visual-similarity heuristics, which are noisy and over-prune. ORBIS uses the model's own output distribution to decide which tokens carry information for *this* generation and which are safe to drop. Practical: works on existing video-DiT checkpoints without retraining. The conceptual move — let the output decide what the input should be — is the architecturally interesting bit.
summary.zh: 视频Diffusion Transformer因三维时空注意力随token数×帧数膨胀而算力暴涨。多数token裁剪方法依赖视觉相似度启发式,噪声大且常误删。ORBIS利用模型自身输出分布判断哪些token对当前生成实际重要、哪些可安全丢弃。实践层面:可直接用于现有video-DiT权重,无需重训。'让输出反过来决定输入应该是什么'的思路才是架构上的关键贡献。

title.en: μ-ORCA: microsecond-scale DNN inference on AMD ACAP for high-energy-physics jet tagging
title.zh: μ-ORCA:面向高能物理喷注识别的AMD ACAP微秒级DNN推理

summary.en: Jet-tagging at colliders needs DNN inference inside the trigger pipeline at microsecond latency on tiny inputs — exactly the case where most accelerators waste 80% of die area on instruction fetch and dataflow they don't need. The paper targets AMD's ACAP (Versal) heterogeneous fabric: tensor cores for the multiply, programmable logic for the control, NoC for the data movement. Niche application, but the systematic engineering of 'small model + extreme latency' is the relevant pattern for inference workloads pushing into agentic decode and edge.
summary.zh: 对撞机喷注识别需在触发流水线内对小输入做微秒级DNN推理——恰是多数加速器为指令取指与不必要的数据流浪费80%晶元面积的场景。本文以AMD ACAP(Versal)异构架构为目标:Tensor Core执行乘法、可编程逻辑做控制、片上网络处理数据搬移。应用面较窄,但'小模型+极致延迟'的系统化工程,对正朝向Agentic解码与边缘扩展的推理负载,有可移植的范式意义。

title.en: AI Research (hardware-relevant)
title.zh: AI研究(与硬件相关)

title.en: Exploiting multicast for collective-communication acceleration in training and inference
title.zh: 训练与推理中利用多播加速集合通信

summary.en: State-of-the-art AllGather and AlltoAll implementations rely on unicast writes and transmit the same data multiple times across the fabric. The paper observes that the underlying interconnects (NVLink, InfiniBand, modern Ethernet) all support hardware multicast — it's just never been used by the AI-collective implementations. Replacing unicast-by-default with multicast-where-applicable removes the duplicate transmissions at the wire level. Concrete numbers on real clusters; the punchline is that the optimization existed in the hardware for years, and the software left it on the floor.
summary.zh: 当前最先进的AllGather/AlltoAll实现依赖单播写入,在网络结构上多次传输相同数据。作者观察到:底层互连(NVLink、InfiniBand、现代以太网)早就支持硬件多播——只是AI集合通信实现从未使用。将默认单播替换为'适用处多播',即可在线缆层面消除重复传输。论文在实际集群上给出具体数字,要点是:该优化在硬件中存在多年,软件却一直未使用。

title.en: Inference scaling for reasoning LLMs: from prefill-bound to capacity-bound
title.zh: 推理型LLM的推理扩展:从prefill约束转向容量约束

summary.en: Classic LLM-serving analysis treats prefill as compute-bound and decode as memory-bound. With reasoning-centric architectures generating chains of thought thousands of tokens long, that mental model breaks: the dominant phase is decode, the dominant cost is *capacity* (per-token KV-cache footprint × concurrent requests), and prefill is comparatively cheap. The paper formalizes the regime, gives the right bottleneck taxonomy, and notes that most existing serving optimizations were built for the wrong workload. Required reading for anyone planning capacity around reasoning-model deployment.
summary.zh: 经典LLM服务分析将prefill视为算力受限、decode视为内存带宽受限。在生成长达数千token思维链的推理型架构下,该心智模型失效:主导阶段变为decode,主导成本是'容量'(每token的KV缓存占用×并发请求数),prefill反而相对廉价。论文形式化了这一新范式,给出正确的瓶颈分类,并指出多数现有服务优化原本针对的是另一种工作负载。所有围绕推理型模型规划产能的人都应阅读。

title.en: DynaFlow: programmable operator scheduling for transparent intra-device parallelism
title.zh: DynaFlow:面向透明设备内并行的可编程算子调度

summary.en: GPUs underutilize their hardware on most ML workloads — an attention layer leaves the tensor cores idle during softmax, a MoE layer leaves them idle during routing, etc. Overlapping operators with different resource profiles closes that gap, but every existing framework demands invasive, model-specific code changes to do it. DynaFlow exposes a programmable scheduler so the overlap is configured rather than hand-coded. Implementation is in PyTorch; the abstraction is the contribution.
summary.zh: 在大多数ML工作负载下,GPU硬件并未充分利用——注意力层的softmax阶段Tensor Core空闲、MoE层的路由阶段Tensor Core空闲。重叠资源占用不同的算子可弥合这一差距,但现有框架需对每个模型做侵入式定制改造。DynaFlow暴露一个可编程调度器,使重叠由配置完成而非手工实现。实现位于PyTorch层;真正的贡献是该抽象本身。

title.en: EDA, Verification & Design Automation
title.zh: EDA与设计自动化

title.en: CPPL: an LLM-targeted intermediate language between natural language and CIRCT
title.zh: CPPL:位于自然语言与CIRCT之间、面向大模型的中间语言

summary.en: LLM-to-RTL has been the obvious EDA application of LLMs since GPT-4, but production usage stays low because raw LLM-emitted RTL is hard to validate and integrate with compiler-based flows (CIRCT, etc.). CPPL is a typed prompt-language at the right level of abstraction for an LLM to emit reliably *and* for CIRCT to consume directly. The architectural contribution: don't try to make the LLM emit RTL, give it a target that's correct-by-construction and that downstream tools already trust. A cleaner separation of concerns than most prior LLM-EDA work.
summary.zh: 自GPT-4以来,LLM到RTL一直被视为LLM在EDA的明显应用方向,但实际投产很少——LLM直出的RTL难以校验、也难以与基于编译器的设计流(如CIRCT)整合。CPPL是位于合适抽象层级的类型化提示语言,既便于LLM稳定输出,也可被CIRCT直接消费。架构贡献在于:不要让LLM直出RTL,而是给它一个'构造即正确'且下游工具早已信任的目标。该关注点分离比此前多数LLM-EDA工作更干净。
